message:
test(proptest): add 15 property tests for cancellation protocol coverage gaps

Cover CancellationToken scope_id preservation, child_count tracking,
generation idempotency, telemetry counter accumulation, telemetry snapshot
serde roundtrip, cascade shutdown propagation to N children, finalizer
failure tracking in ShutdownSummary, policy override vs tier defaults,
events_for_scope filtering, ExtendGrace escalation with extended period
verification, Display non-empty for ShutdownReason/EscalationAction/
FinalizerStatus, coordinator canonical_string scope count, and
correlation prefix in events. 13→28 proptest tests (36 total with
non-proptest).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
